name: GoA Design System Anti-Patterns
summary: Common anti-patterns and pitfalls to avoid when using the GoA Design System

designAntiPatterns.name: Custom Components Over GoA Components
designAntiPatterns.description: Building custom components when equivalent GoA components exist
detection: Custom button, input, or layout components
designAntiPatterns.solution: Exhaust GoA library options before building custom. Check examples for similar patterns.

designAntiPatterns.name: Mismatched User Type Patterns
designAntiPatterns.description: Using citizen patterns for worker tools or vice versa
detection: Citizen forms with high information density
designAntiPatterns.solution: Use appropriate patterns for each user type. See design/user-types.json.

designAntiPatterns.name: Inconsistent Layout Structure
designAntiPatterns.description: Not using proper layout components consistently
designAntiPatterns.solution: Use consistent layout patterns across the application.

designAntiPatterns.name: Accessibility as Afterthought
designAntiPatterns.description: Adding accessibility features after design/development completion
designAntiPatterns.solution: Use GoA components which provide accessibility by default. Test early.

technicalAntiPatterns.name: Multiple Frontend Frameworks
technicalAntiPatterns.description: Using React, Angular, and other frameworks in same project
detection: package.json contains both React and Angular
technicalAntiPatterns.solution: Choose primary framework and use consistently.

technicalAntiPatterns.name: Custom CSS Over Component Props
technicalAntiPatterns.description: Using custom CSS to override GoA component appearance
technicalAntiPatterns.solution: Use component props instead. If props don't exist, contact design system team.

technicalAntiPatterns.name: Overuse of GoabSpacer
technicalAntiPatterns.description: Using GoabSpacer instead of component margin properties
detection: Spacers between components that support margins
technicalAntiPatterns.solution: Use component margin props (mb, mt, ml, mr) when available.

processAntiPatterns.name: Skipping Design System Review
processAntiPatterns.description: Implementing designs without checking design system compliance
processAntiPatterns.solution: Establish design review checkpoints. Consult design system team.

processAntiPatterns.name: Not Reporting Component Gaps
processAntiPatterns.description: Working around design system limitations without feedback
detection: Same custom solutions across multiple teams
processAntiPatterns.solution: Report gaps to design system team. Contribute solutions back.

quickFixes.spacing-abuse: Replace GoabSpacer with component margin props
quickFixes.custom-styling: Use component props instead of CSS overrides

processChecks.check: Proper component usage, no CSS overrides
